headline: Regeneron (REGN): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Regeneron has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 32.3%. Its stock price has climbed to $767, representing a healthy 35.8% increase. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Raises Price Target to $796
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Matthew Harrison   maintains Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $769 to $796.
